DECLARATION OF JARED R. SMITH IN SUPPORT OF PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND MOTION FOR STAY (TRANSACTION ID # 16157043) FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERSPHERE, INC. A NEVADA CORPORATION AKHAVAN, ARDESHIR AN INDIVIDUAL KATERAF PARTICIPATION, LTD., A CYRPUS LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFFS INTERSPHERE, INC., ARDESHIR AKHAVAN AND KATERAF PARTICIPATION, LTD'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS GRANTED. THE ENTIRETY OF THE CASE IS NOW STAYED. WITHIN 10 DAYS DEFENDANTS MAY SEND A LETTER TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL STATING WHETHER DEFENDANTS PREFER ARBITRATION IN SAN FRANCISCO, ACCORDING TO JAMS RULES, OR THEY PREFER ARBITRATION IN CYPRUS, ACCORDING TO THE RULES SET FORTH IN THE ARBITRATION AGREEMENT. IF THEY DON'T MAKE SUCH AN ELECTION, THEN PLAINTIFF WILL NEED TO FILE AN ARBITRATION WITHIN 30 DAYS IN CYPRUS. IF DEFENDANTS MAKE SUCH AN ELECTION, PLAINTIFFS NEED TO FILE AN ARBITRATION DEMAND WITHIN 30 DAYS OF THE VENUE THAT WAS SELECTED BY DEFENDANTS. IN EITHER EVENT, IF THOSE 30 DAYS PASS WITHOUT AN ARBITRATION AT THE MANNED FILED, THE STAY WILL BE LIFTED AND THE CASE WILL PROCEED IN THIS COURT. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFFS WILL NEED TO PREPARE THIS ORDER AND SUBMIT IT AS SOON AS POSSIBLE BY E-MAIL TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. COUNSEL FOR ALL SIDES SHALL BE INCLUDED IN THE EMAIL TO COMPLY WITH C.R.C. 3.1320. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976. (D302)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorney, Ira P. Rothken (415-924-4250), for plaintiffs/moving parties Intersphere Inc., Kateraf Participation Ltd. and Ardeshir Akhavan (telephonic appearance)

Attorney, Virgina Sanderson (415-955-1155), for defendants/opposing parties Verde Media Corp. and Jeremy Greene

DEFENDANT JEREMY GREENE AND VERDE MEDIA CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S first amended COMPLAINT is taken off calendar as moot, in light of the ruling on the petition to compel arbitration. Plaintiff counsel shall prepare and submit a {proposed] order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (D302)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion For Stay
Off Calendar Jun-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Attorney, Ira P. Rothken (415-924-4250), for plaintiffs/moving parties Intersphere Inc., Kateraf Participation Ltd. and Ardeshir Akhavan (telephonic appearance)

Attorney, Virgina Sanderson (415-955-1155), for defendants/opposing parties Verde Media Corp. and Jeremy Greene

Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion For Stay are argued and submitted. Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS INTERSPHERE, INC., ARDESHIR AKHAVAN and KATERAF PARTICIPATION, LTD'S petition to compel arbitration is granted. The entirety of the case is now stayed. Within 10 days defendants may send a letter to plaintiff's counsel stating whether defendants prefer arbitration in San Francisco, according to jams rules, or they prefer arbitration in Cyprus, according to the rules set forth in the arbitration agreement. If they don't make such an election, then plaintiff will need to file an arbitration within 30 days in Cyprus.
If defendants make such an election, plaintiffs need to file an arbitration demand within 30 days of the venue that was selected by defendants. In either event, if those 30 days pass without an arbitration at the manned filed, the stay will be lifted and the case will proceed in this court. Counsel for plaintiffs will need to prepare this order and submit it as soon as possible by e-mail to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. Counsel for all sides shall be included in the email to comply with C.R.C. 3.1320.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (D302)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Continued To Jun-29-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

DEFENDANTS JEREMY GREENE and VERDE MEDIA CORPORATION'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to June 29, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 to be heard concurrently with the petition to compel arbitration. Because granting the petition to compel arbitration would moot this demurrer, judicial economy is served by deferring the demurrer hearing till the same date as the continued hearing on the petition to compel arbitration.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion For Stay
Off Calendar Jun-16-2016 Continued To Jun-29-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

PLAINTIFFS INTERSPHERE, INC., ARDESHIR AKHAVAN and KATERAF PARTICIPATION, LTD'S Petition To Compel Arbitration And Motion For Stay is continued to June 29, 2016 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302 to give defendants an opportunity to respond to the evidence submitted by plaintiffs with their reply papers. Defendants may file supplemental opposition papers no later than June 24, 2016 limited to a discussion of the evidence submitted with the reply papers. (Jay v. Mahaffey (2013) 218 Cal. App. 4th 1522, 1536-38).

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
